title: Add Home and Learning Resources Links to Left Navigation
story: As a DataTools Pro user on the settings or share page, I want Home and Learning Resources links in the left navigation, so that I can easily return home or access tutorials.
description:
Add two new links to the left navigation sidebar on the settings and share pages.

## New Links
1. **Home** — navigates back to the main application page
2. **Learning Resources** — opens `https://datatoolspro.com/tutorials/` in a new browser window
acceptance_criteria: Home link appears in the left navigation on settings page
Home link appears in the left navigation on share page
Home link navigates to the main application page
Learning Resources link appears in the left navigation
Learning Resources opens datatoolspro.com/tutorials/ in a new window
ux_changes: Home and Learning Resources navigation links added to the settings/share page sidebar for quick access to the main app and tutorials.
